textByHash.07df552c99f9ef8e7d56114fd4c91feda3f4ea8b: My blessings will entice nature to bloom in Mort Myre! And then with natures harvest you can fill a druids pouch and release the Ghasts from their torment.
textByHash.1cd4c6f31ab1e64b69a616cb6a2445e149e60648: My friend, I will bless it for you and you will then be able to accomplish great things. Now then, I must cast the enchantment. You can bless a new sickle by dipping it in the holy water of the grotto.
textByHash.242c1a29ae10d41b02ae53664a982189f6baa438: Hello. Why have you returned so soon after your last visit?
textByHash.25f71ca17532ff9bfcc183e724d85642d85c0de9: Ah, a Tanglefoot! Your information is correct, secateurs that have been blessed by a Nature Spirit are the only weapons that can harm such a terrible creature.
textByHash.286ab5af7018bd71d52797397766b2cfd4473fa0: Alright, my friend. Return to me when you have all that is required. I shall be waiting.
textByHash.2d24e4d96f5dba269449ff8ac002b5d7fc48f245: Farewell, and good luck with your coming battle.
textByHash.2fac82af1d6fe11721ce3e22ea010c7124c741cc: Have you brought me the silver sickle?
textByHash.3d11fd979efcf38bec458e66dca676e62d9ae893: If you should lose the blessed sickle, simply bring another to my altar of nature and refresh it in the grotto waters.
textByHash.464cc00b4ba2dfb65114fba169c9358ed76ea048: Hmmm, good, the transformation is complete. Now, my friend, in return for your assistance, I will help you to kill the Ghasts. First bring to me a silver sickle so that I can bless it for you.
textByHash.4739426edf07e2a606a47e9008e0c1e307e12283: Now you can go forth and make the swamp bloom. Collect natures bounty to fill a druids pouch. So armed will the Ghasts be bound to you until, you flee or they are defeated.
textByHash.513b7a7d7c8e89ee2b3490288aa646ef4b84bb7a: For you my friend, it is no problem at all.
textByHash.51cd0982258624d8a33368f6a4eac334121de1e3: You'll need this in order to collect together natures bounty. When it contains items, it will bind the Ghast to you until you flee or it is defeated.
textByHash.613672b04158cd45baeb0984a8c147a060035e27: You may use it wisely within the area of Mort Myre to affect natures balance and bring forth a bounty of natures harvest. Once collected into the druid pouch will the Ghast be apparent.
textByHash.66934b80d80a2cb55490157152b8650f9f01efb2: Yes! I can sense the presence of a hespori near here. It's to the north east, on a small island in the swamp.
textByHash.68a8a909325a47f6d615eb7440a6ed2ec39ce542: Go forth and with the sickle make the swamp bloom. Collect natures bounty to fill a druids pouch. So armed will the Ghasts be bound to you until, you flee or they are defeated.
textByHash.6a5f38d23f0e29149bdfdee627e6ceafd364d083: Welcome back, my friend. I sensed that you require my help and so I have once more returned.
textByHash.6c12f04a77f2fa172eda8cb043163ac363b0dd6e: Before I can make this grotto into an Altar of Nature, I need to be sure that the Ghasts will be kept at bay. Go forth into Mort Myre and slay three Ghasts. You'll be releasing their souls from Mort Myre.
textByHash.8d7b26d2ca1ffb948720ea3cf0360279a07a6a4e: Welcome to my Altar to Nature! Farewell my friend, and keep those Ghasts at bay!
textByHash.951c5c65a2aaf27619c3e7ab3e25f9c1e348e4fa: Many thanks my friend, you have completed your quest! I can now change this place into a holy sanctuary! And forever will it now be an Altar of Nature!
textByHash.96b8974417c08d5bc40e2a67ca62a5303268dd92: I can sense it to the north east, on a small island in the swamp.
textByHash.980376e5306e5577d8a7ff729b6a6a1611361ca2: Welcome back, my friend. Did you find that hespori?
textByHash.a4dc40faec738010d8627b23f797d4ed2e6d99a0: Well, come to me when you have it.
textByHash.adeb8c9b5cd78e071a1ee4c1181c5af8c5fdd646: You could make one yourself if you're artisan enough. I've heard of a distant sandy place where you can buy the mould that you require, it's similar in many respects to the creating of a holy symbol.
textByHash.b15e1ac809839650aede0a77369ee2afa94d6131: Welcome back, my friend. I sense that you need my help with something.
textByHash.b822e9fdc1988a56163fcf0443e35a53d564c159: I shall be glad to help you. Do you have all of the required items for the ceremony?
textByHash.b95942b49591a34fe3b80a6e9a1ae73d940b701a: That's alright; if you bring me the components for the spell, I'll enchant another pair for you. Would you happen to have all of the required items for the ceremony with you now?
textByHash.d2daa79780b965dc0717fec32b844bd26dfd53d2: I see... Well do be very careful. Hespori are rare enough as it is without people damaging them.
textByHash.d57ca7b40dd2551b203840c3fb38cb97e47ec4e8: The sickle is the symbol and weapon of the Druid, you need to construct one of silver so that I can bless it, with its powers you will be able to defeat the Ghasts of Mort Myre.
textByHash.d6dab5c56ebefea50979907bf75eaef681d2c3a0: It is for collecting natures bounty, once it contains the blossomed items of the swamp, it will make the Ghasts appear and you can then attack them.
textByHash.d9fd1668330e5d8c80ff56c35ab78ceeb9cc4544: Why, I will give it my blessings so that the very swamp in which you stand will blossom and bloom!
textByHash.da635583eec86d094951df822375e1c94423b996: Well, when you do, please come to me and I'll reward you!
textByHash.e4bcce0697eba711dd0a197c7f94d04a96b49078: Secateurs? That's a strange thing to enchant. Would you care to inform me why you need them?
textByHash.f274eb67c48f652840aea9eea68e2a52a746f8f7: Hello again my friend, have you defeated three Ghasts as I asked you?
textByHash.ff6e6b9d3d262a2d1f91d5dc3d8ce1200801d11c: Ah, a hespori. They're wonderful plants. Why are you looking for one?
